title: T-017 — Server Action closeDeptSection (NPD-a.4) with IsAllRequiredFilled gate
prompt:
# T-017 — closeDeptSection Server Action

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §7.3, §2.2
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
closeDeptSection(productCode, dept) Server Action that requires <dept>.write permission, asserts is_all_required_filled(productCode, dept) is TRUE, sets closed_<dept>='Yes', emits fa.dept_closed event.

## Implementation contract
New apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/close-dept-section.ts as 'use server'. RBAC dispatch by dept. Calls is_all_required_filled in same tx; if false returns DepartmentNotReadyError listing missing required cols. Else UPDATE product SET closed_<dept>='Yes' (parametrised, sanitised); emit fa.dept_closed with payload {dept}. Returns {dept, closedAt}.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/close-dept-section.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/__tests__/close-dept-section.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given fa Core all required filled by Jane, when closeDeptSection(code,'Core') runs, then closed_core='Yes' and one fa.dept_closed event is emitted with payload.dept='Core'
2. Given a missing required Core col (e.g., recipe_components is NULL), when closeDeptSection runs, then DepartmentNotReadyError thrown listing 'recipe_components'
3. Given user role planning_user attempts closeDeptSection(code,'Core'), when called, then AuthError thrown

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests covering happy path, NotReady error, RBAC denial
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test close-dept-section'

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass IsAllRequiredFilled gate
- Do not allow injection via dept param (whitelist enum)
- Do not skip outbox emit

pipeline_inputs.description: Server-side enforcement of Closed_<Dept>=Yes only when IsAllRequiredFilled passes; emits fa.dept_closed.
pipeline_inputs.details: Whitelisted dept enum, RBAC by dept, transactional check + update + outbox emit.
out_of_scope: Do not implement reopen flow here (T-018)
acceptance_criteria: Given fa Core all required filled, when closeDeptSection(code,'Core') runs, then closed_core='Yes' and a fa.dept_closed event is emitted with payload.dept='Core'
Given a missing required Core col (recipe_components NULL), when closeDeptSection runs, then DepartmentNotReadyError is thrown listing 'recipe_components'
Given user role planning_user attempts closeDeptSection(code,'Core'), when called, then AuthError is thrown
test_strategy: RED: 3 tests covering happy path, NotReady error, RBAC denial before action exists
risk_red_lines: Do not allow injection via dept param
